nodes.label: Purchase Order Form Screen
nodes.rationale: The purchase order form guides users through supplier selection, destination warehouse, purchase date, product lines, and a sticky summary before create/update.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Supplier Picker Modal
nodes.rationale: Suppliers are selected through a searchable modal that fills hidden supplier_id and visible supplier summary fields.

nodes.label: Purchase Order Product Line Editor
nodes.rationale: Order items use catalog selection, SKU/code, quantity, high-precision unit price, row totals, and live aggregate totals.
